title: Bank CTBC Indonesia Deploys Infosys Finacle Digital Banking Solution Suite on Cloud
detailed_summary: Infosys Finacle, part of EdgeVerve Systems, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Infosys, announced the successful deployment of the Finacle Digital Banking Solution Suite on a cloud hosted model for PT Bank CTBC Indonesia. The deployment supports the bank's digital transformation initiatives and includes upgrades to Finacle loans, deposits, trade finance, payments, and customer data hub. The document states the deployment can help the bank scale, accelerate new product and service launches, improve operational efficiency, enhance customer experience, and reduce total cost of ownership. The Finacle suite on a PostgreSQL database platform reportedly resulted in over 300% reduction in bulk processing time.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Finacle and PT Bank CTBC Indonesia announced the successful deployment of Finacle Digital Banking Solution Suite on a cloud hosted model as part of the bank's digital transformation initiatives.
key_facts.section_heading: Bank CTBC Indonesia Adopts Infosys Finacle Digital Banking Solution on Cloud

key_facts.fact: Bank CTBC Indonesia upgraded to the latest version of Finacle loans, deposits, trade finance, payments, and customer data hub as part of the adoption.
key_facts.section_heading: Bank CTBC Indonesia Adopts Infosys Finacle Digital Banking Solution on Cloud

key_facts.fact: The upgraded solutions are integrated with Bank CTBC Indonesia's existing application landscape, including Finacle Online Banking and Finacle Retail Loan Origination solutions.
key_facts.section_heading: Bank CTBC Indonesia Adopts Infosys Finacle Digital Banking Solution on Cloud

key_facts.fact: The Finacle Digital Banking Solution Suite on cloud enables the bank to accelerate new feature releases and improve time-to-market for new offerings while maintaining robust security.
The Finacle Customer Data Hub gives the bank a unified, 360-degree view of customer data, enabling hyper personalization of services and seamless third-party integration for allied offerings.
The Finacle suite on a PostgreSQL database platform resulted in over 300% reduction in bulk processing time, enabling operational efficiency and reduced total cost of ownership.
